notes: Post-repair recheck pins 58 canonical products from 66 current restaurant-issued dinner, brunch, kids, and happy-hour presentations, with alcohol-only rows excluded and nonalcoholic beverages last.
All 25 frozen products reconcile exactly once; all 33 omitted current products and the repeated cross-service presentation evidence are restored.
The corrected catalog contains exactly 30 official ingredient rows, two restaurant-linked menu-ingredient rows, two restaurant-linked product rows, and 24 unavailable rows.

Sour Cream & Onion Chicharrones is the sole may-contain row; its linked dairy, gluten, and dairy cross-contact wording remains item-specific vendor evidence and is not generalized into a matrix or restaurant-wide warning.
The hash-pinned catalog preserves all owner-menu service presentations, corrects the stale PDF-column categories, consolidates repeated products deterministically, and keeps beverages last.
The 25 frozen rows finish with fifteen corrected mismatch outcomes and ten accurately unavailable outcomes; no linked evidence is promoted to restaurant-issued authority.

findings.summary: The 25-row frozen catalog is dinner-only and omits 33 products from the current 58-product, 66-presentation boundary across dinner, brunch, kids, happy hour, and nonalcoholic beverages.
findings.resolution: Restored all 33 omitted products and pinned all 66 current source presentations to 58 canonical products.

findings.summary: The frozen PDF extraction retains stale dinner-column category outcomes and does not preserve repeated products across their current service presentations.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt source-scoped categories and retained every repeated service presentation on its canonical product.

findings.summary: Fifteen frozen rows have direct allergen or source outcomes inconsistent with the current owner menus and partial restaurant-linked evidence; ten frozen rows are accurately unavailable.
findings.resolution: Corrected all fifteen mismatch outcomes, preserved the ten accurately unavailable rows, and retained exact restaurant-issued versus linked-vendor provenance.

findings.summary: The frozen Sour Cream & Onion Chicharrones row omits the linked product's affirmative dairy statement and item-specific gluten-and-dairy cross-contact disclosure.
findings.resolution: Restored the linked dairy positive and the item-specific milk and gluten may-contain signals without generalizing them to any other product.

repairs.summary: Verified the 58-product and 66-presentation boundary, exact authority split, frozen reconciliation, corrected categories, and sole item-specific Chicharrones cross-contact row.

notes: Generated counts: 58 total products from 66 presentations; 30 official ingredients; 2 linked-menu ingredients; 2 linked-product disclosures; 24 unavailable; 1 may-contain row.
